sentence: Gluteous maximus finds only the uquiche door worth opening.

wombos.definition: The deepest possible state of locked-in focus — gluttonously, righteously, maximally concentrated. Beyond clocked in; this is the final form of being dialed in.
wombos.example: Leave me alone, I'm trying to get some gluteous maximus.

wombos.definition: What happens when uniche and quiche combine forces — the singular, niche, one-of-a-kind specificity raised to the absolute. Peak quiche.
wombos.example: Combine their powers and it becomes uquiche.
